description: IBM provides cloud infrastructure, platform, AI, and data services through IBM Cloud and related products. Its developer-facing surfaces on IBM-owned domains include the IBM Cloud API reference catalog, the IBM Cloud CLI, and a watsonx BI remote MCP server.
summary: IBM Cloud exposes a broad authenticated HTTP API library, the authenticated `ibmcloud` CLI, and at least one authenticated MCP endpoint for watsonx BI.

surfaces.name: IBM watsonx BI remote MCP server
